cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 後期 · 庶民 文化
cover.subtitle:
양반에서 서민으로,
문화의 주체가 바뀐 시대.
cover.imagePrompt: Late Joseon dynasty 18th century genre painting (Kim Hong-do style) illustration. Foreground: ordinary Korean villagers (men in white hemp clothes, women in colorful hanbok) gathered watching a ssireum wrestling match. Two wrestlers grappling at center. Background: a crowd in a circle, vendors with snacks, a low thatched-roof building. Warm earthy tones, lively folk-painting feel. Color: earth-brown + crimson + indigo + ink-black. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background, in the style of Kim Hong-do genre paintings. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_headline:
"정선 진경 · 김홍도 서민 · 신윤복 풍류"
화가 3인 매칭이 핵심.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험은 화가별 대표작과 주제(정선=인왕제색도·금강전도, 김홍도=씨름·서당, 신윤복=미인도·단오풍정)를 정확히 매칭하는 문제 빈출. 김정희=세한도·추사체도 함께.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized rolled Korean traditional painting scroll with a small wooden mask (Korean folk talchum mask) silhouette next to it. Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
